name: Gmail
description: Read, search and send emails via Gmail with attachment support. Requires OAuth setup in the Gmail isle settings.
examples: Send an email to john@example.com about the meeting
Send an email with an image attachment
Download the attachment from that email
Search my inbox for messages from GitHub

commands.name: inbox
commands.description: Use the gmail_list tool to fetch the 10 most recent unread emails from the inbox. Display sender, subject, and date for each. Highlight any urgent or important messages. Keep the output scannable and concise.

commands.name: email
commands.shortDescription: Compose and send an email via Gmail
commands.description: Ask the user for the recipient, subject, and body if not already provided. Then use the gmail_send tool to send the email. Confirm the details before sending and report success once done.
